text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's the big deal? 
Look a'cha, all hunched over.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Something troublin' ya? 
Come on, lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I mean, no guarantees I'll be able 
to solve your problem, but…

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ain't nothing worse than keepin' 
it bottled up! Just let it all out, 
and you'll feel better in no time!
